---
title: "Netherlands vs Japan"
author: "Håvard Strand"
description: ""
date: "2026-06-15 00:55:00"
categories: [Update]
---

# Netherlands vs Japan

Japan deserved a point against the Dutch. 

```{r standings, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source(here::here("R", "plot_standings.R"))
this_match <- 11
lag        <- 1
plot_standings(this_match, lag)
```

Øyvind and Christian has some space in the lead, with Karin, Hallvard, Linda and Jan Erling in pursuit.
```{r show, echo=FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("standings.png")
```
Jan Erling and Christian got the exact right result. Well done!
